tigers, weapons, serpents, cough, fever or consumption.
Pisces It may be due to snake-poison, exhaustion of a
journey, storm, machine, ship-wreck or fall of lightning.
In case the Sth house is occupied by any one of the seven
planets beginning with the Sun the end may be brought about
by (i) fire, (ii) water, (hi) weapon, (iv) fall, (v) fever, (vi) thirst or
diabetes, and (vii) starvation, in order. On the other hand if
this house is aspected by strong planets, the- cause of death may
be the particular humours belonging to them. Now we can
also see if the subject is going to die in his own house or place
or abroad. If the Sth house is a movable sign, death will take
place in a foreign country: if it is a fixed one. at home: and if a
dual one. on the way or near home.
Now 1 shall give some yogas (planetary configurations) for
the exit of the soul under different circumstances : —
